messages.content: I will begin by investigating the `memory_bank/SESSIONS_MAP.md` file to understand the current project state and determine the specific context for the "upgrade" request.

thoughts.subject: Contemplating Upgrades
thoughts.description: I'm currently focused on the user's desire for an "upgrade," specifically within the Gemini CLI context. Reviewing `memory_bank/GEMINI.md` and `app/GEMINI.md` is helping me understand the potential scope. The user could be aiming for a system upgrade, dependency updates, or something tied to the Metropolis roadmap. I'm carefully analyzing the provided files.

thoughts.subject: Defining Upgrade Scope
thoughts.description:
\n\n

I'm now zeroing in on defining the precise meaning of "upgrade." Considering the Gemini CLI, the `/upgrade` prompt could indicate a command execution or a request to advance the project's roadmap. I'm focusing on the `SESSIONS_MAP.md` mentioned in `memory_bank/GEMINI.md` to establish context and identify current progress. I'm also planning to check the `Makefile` or relevant scripts for a potential upgrade task, trying to cover all bases to interpret this request.

toolCalls.name: read_file
toolCalls.description: Reads and returns the content of a specified file. If the file is large, the content will be truncated. The tool's response will clearly indicate if truncation has occurred and will provide details on how to read more of the file using the 'start_line' and 'end_line' parameters. Handles text, images (PNG, JPG, GIF, WEBP, SVG, BMP), audio files (MP3, WAV, AIFF, AAC, OGG, FLAC), and PDF files. For text files, it can read specific line ranges.
